description: Perform a Friedman non-parametric repeated measures test on the five Agreeableness items (A1, A2, A3, A4, A5) using the BFI-25 personality dataset located at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/BFI25.csv. The analysis must include Durbin-Conover pairwise comparisons and descriptives. Save the completed analysis to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/FriedmanAgreeableness.omv.
